description_long: This is a tall, cylindrical red fire extinguisher with a slightly domed top and a flat base, showing signs of wear and use such as scratches and faded paint. A large, rectangular, white instruction label with text and symbols is affixed to the front, partially worn and stained. The extinguisher features a prominent black hose attached near the top, looping down the side and secured by a metal band at the middle. The top is fitted with a red lever handle and a nozzle, both showing some scuff marks. Two gray metal bands encircle the body, likely for structural reinforcement or mounting. The overall appearance suggests it is a standard, portable fire extinguisher suitable for urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or building interiors.
description: A worn, red cylindrical fire extinguisher with a black hose, red handle, and a large white instruction label on the front. It features metal bands and visible signs of use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the instruction label, red handle, and black hose hanging to the right.
description_view_1: Rear view with no label, showing the back of the cylinder and the attachment points for the hose and bands.
description_view_2: Side view highlighting the hose running down the length of the extinguisher and the handle at the top.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the hose visible along the body and the edge of the label partially seen.
attribute_label_or_signage: Large, rectangular, white label with text and symbols on the front of the cylinder; appears worn and partially stained.
attribute_mounting_bracket_or_holder: Two gray metal bands encircle the cylinder, possibly for mounting, with small protruding rods visible on the sides.
attribute_hose_or_nozzle: Black hose attached near the top, running down the side and secured at the middle; nozzle at the end of the hose.
